transition.label: bootstrap_completed[0] = true, bootstrap_completed[1] = true, client_state[0] = CLIENT_STATE_BOOTSTRAP_COMPLETE, client_state[1] = CLIENT_STATE_BOOTSTRAP_COMPLETE, endpoint_id[0] = DUPLICATE_ENDPOINT_ID, endpoint_id[1] = DUPLICATE_ENDPOINT_ID, provisioned_identity_secret[0] = LEGIT_SECRET, provisioned_identity_secret[1] = LEGIT_SECRET, presented_identity_secret[0] = LEGIT_SECRET, presented_identity_secret[1] = CLONE_SECRET, owner_code[0] = OWNER_CLIENT0, owner_code[1] = OWNER_CLIENT1, clone_device[1] = true, current_client = 0, registration_turn = 0

(!IDENTITY_BINDING_ENABLED || presented_identity_secret[current_client] == provisioned_identity_secret[current_client]) && (!DUPLICATE_ENDPOINT_DETECTION_ENABLED || server_session_owner[endpoint_id[current_client]] == OWNER_NONE)

identity_binding_verified[current_client] = true, server_session_owner[endpoint_id[current_client]] = owner_code[current_client], server_last_msg_id[current_client] = client_message_id[current_client], command_authorized[current_client] = true

(IDENTITY_BINDING_ENABLED && presented_identity_secret[current_client] != provisioned_identity_secret[current_client]) || (DUPLICATE_ENDPOINT_DETECTION_ENABLED && server_session_owner[endpoint_id[current_client]] != OWNER_NONE)

duplicate_endpoint_detected = server_session_owner[endpoint_id[current_client]] != OWNER_NONE, identity_mismatch_detected = presented_identity_secret[current_client] != provisioned_identity_secret[current_client], cloned_device_detected = clone_device[current_client], attack_detected = true, command_authorized[current_client] = false

query.comment: The legitimate endpoint owner can register.
A cloned device using a duplicate endpoint is reachable and rejected.
Duplicate endpoint detection raises an attack flag.
The cloned duplicate endpoint cannot become registered.
The legitimate device owns its endpoint session after registration.
The clone cannot receive command authorization after the legitimate owner is bound.

query.formula: A[] command_authorized[0] imply identity_binding_verified[0] and server_session_owner[endpoint_id[0]] == OWNER_CLIENT0
query.comment: Command authorization for the legitimate device requires successful identity binding and preserved endpoint ownership.
